description: TUI Search/Filter & Precision Diagnostic — Add fuzzy search for convention review and precision calibration diagnostic message

userStories.title: Search/filter with fuzzy matching in TUI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to type a keyword to find conventions instantly, with tolerance for typos, so I can quickly locate specific conventions among dozens.
acceptanceCriteria: / enters search mode, bottom row shows filter input bar
Typing filters conventions in real time by description field using case-insensitive substring + Levenshtein distance ≤ 2 fuzzy matching
Backspace removes last character; empty filter exits search mode
Enter locks filter (exits search mode, keeps filter active)
Esc clears filter and exits search mode
y/n/p/s keys blocked in search mode
Navigation walks only through filtered subset; counter reflects filtered count
Empty state shows 'No matching conventions' when no matches

userStories.title: Precision Diagnostic Message
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to know whether Seshat is well-calibrated after my review, so I can decide if AI agents should trust the detected conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: After q → summary, diagnostic line prints after precision: ≥70% shows 'calibrated', <70% shows 'low precision' warning
Works for edge cases: 0 decisions, all confirmed, all rejected
